title: Monitoring & drift (data / concept / label) + DSA 1-D DP
focus: PSI / KS / JS for drift; closed-loop retraining; delayed labels.

items.label: Maximum Product Subarray
interviewQuestions: State the DP: define the state, the transition, and the base case explicitly.
Top-down (memoized recursion) vs bottom-up (tabulation) — which is more natural here, and why?
Can you space-optimize from O(n) to O(1)? Show the rolling-window trick.

items.label: Word Break
interviewQuestions: State the DP: define the state, the transition, and the base case explicitly.
Top-down (memoized recursion) vs bottom-up (tabulation) — which is more natural here, and why?
Can you space-optimize from O(n) to O(1)? Show the rolling-window trick.

items.label: Data drift, concept drift, label drift
interviewQuestions: Compare data drift vs concept drift vs label drift — give an example of each.
Walk through three statistical tests you'd use to detect drift (PSI, KS, JS).

items.label: Monitoring stack: predictions, latency, errors
interviewQuestions: What metrics do you monitor for a deployed model beyond accuracy?
How would you slice your model monitoring dashboard so a regression in one cohort doesn't get masked?

items.label: Closed-loop monitoring & retraining triggers
interviewQuestions: How would you decide when to retrain — schedule vs trigger-based?
How do you monitor when ground-truth labels arrive with delay?
